title: Happy Birthday Banner, Birthday Decorations for Girls and Women with 12 inch Balloons Banner Bunting Decorations Green Pink.
features: 【What You Get】: Happy birthday banner decorations for women set contains: 1 x Happy Birthday Banner, 1 birthday bunting, 3 x gold latex balloons, 3 x green latex Balloons , 3 x pink latex balloons and 3 x white latex balloons, a great value set to decorate your birthday party.

【Premium Quality】: The birthday banners for girls are made of cardboard, which can be reused without damage during use. The balloons are made of latex, which is highly malleable and not easy to break. The exquisite birthday party decoration will give you a unique birthday.

【Eye-Catching Birthday Decor】: The happy birthday balloons banner pack is a combination of three colors, unique and attractive.The birthday banner is placed in the middle, and the surrounding can be decorated with birthday bunting and balloons, to make the whole birthday party more complete and shiny.

【Easy To Use】: The happy birthday banner and bunting need to be assembled by yourself, just thread through the holes in the card. Balloons can be inflated with helium, which you can use to tie up with string or stick to the wall.

【All Ages Valid】: This birthday party decoration has no age-restricted, suitable for all ages (1st 2th 16th 18th 21st 25th 30th 50th 60th ect), this birthday party decoration creates a romantic and comfortable atmosphere, giving you a special birthday.
